title: verinea fistulosa
intro: Verinea fistulosa, also known as Spring Fugitive, is a rare and short-lived plant species in the saxifrage family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's extracts and preparations have been reported to provide numerous health benefits, including wound healing, anti-arthritic, and anti-cancer properties. Verinea fistulosa is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, and is typically harvested in early spring when it is in bloom.
